query: SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle IN ('Book PDF', 'Charles Duhigg', 'David Brooks', 'Jefferson-Fisher-Open-Graph') OR bookTitle LIKE 'bk_rand%' ORDER BY bookTitle;
